_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: Error bars: mean ± SEM (n = 3 biological replicates)
details: Used for statistical analysis and dose-response curve generation with error bars showing mean ± SEM from biological replicates
